plan_text:
# Add User Email Verification

### Task 1: Read the codebase
### Task 2: Understand the auth module
### Task 3: Design the token schema
### Task 4: Write the token model at src/models/token.go:1-45

```go
package models

import (
    "crypto/rand"
    "encoding/hex"
    "time"
)

type VerificationToken struct {
    ID        int64
    UserID    int64
    Token     string
    ExpiresAt time.Time
    CreatedAt time.Time
}

func NewVerificationToken(userID int64) *VerificationToken {
    b := make([]byte, 32)
    rand.Read(b)
    return &VerificationToken{
        UserID:    userID,
        Token:     hex.EncodeToString(b),
        ExpiresAt: time.Now().Add(24 * time.Hour),
        CreatedAt: time.Now(),
    }
}
```

### Task 5: Write one test
### Task 6: Run the test
### Task 7: Write another test
